Michael Jackson, Manav, was an American singer, songwriter, and dancer widely regarded as the "King of Pop." He was one of the most influential and iconic pop music entertainers of all time, known for his chart-topping albums such as "Thriller" and "Off the Wall." He passed away on June 25, 2009.
